stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 6, Part I, what is the correct definition of a "commercial air transport operation"?

options.a: An aircraft operation transporting passengers, cargo, or mail for remuneration or other valuable consideration.
options.b: A scheduled aircraft operation transporting passengers, cargo, or mail for remuneration or hire.
options.c: An aircraft operation by a commercial operator with or without remuneration or valuable consideration.
options.d: An aircraft operation transporting passengers, cargo, mail, or conducting other special operations for remuneration or valuable consideration.
